description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 25, 2025 at 12:54 PM PT, a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Los Angeles, California was involved in a 
collision involving a passenger vehicle. The Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged until approximately two seconds before the collision. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeast through a narrow stretch of a parking lot when it reached a closed gate. It reversed along the same 
path and then began a multi-point turn to continue traveling northwest through the parking lot. Midway through executing this multi-point 
turn and while the Waymo AV was stationary, the Waymo AV was disengaged and then reversed into a parked passenger vehicle while in 
manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
